hooks.command: test -f "$HOME/.claude/hooks/agent-model-guard.sh" && exit 0; echo "[ORCHESTRATION - top-level sessions only; skip if you are a subagent] Delegate by default: reading/searching >3 files -> Explore/sonnet subagent returning conclusions (never file dumps); parallelizable or well-spec'd implementation -> concurrent sonnet agents in one message. ALWAYS pass explicit model on Agent calls - omitted/inherit runs the subagent on YOUR tier and burns top-tier limits. Grind detector: >10 direct edits or >3 fix-verify rounds by orchestrator -> brief it out to an executor. Execute directly: small single-file edits, judgment/taste/synthesis, work needing full conversation context. Quality miss -> escalate to smarter model, never same-tier retry. Verify subagent output before relaying. Full policy: CLAUDE.md 'Model Orchestration'."
